resonance_events.excerpt: Where is Europe? It is in you.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Space is in you. The physical body is in space, but not you.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Once exposed to sunlight, a sensitive plate cannot take on image. Similarly the mind... after exposure in Your Light.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Berichtet über die radikale Umkehrung der Raumwahrnehmung: Die Welt befindet sich im Ich, nicht umgekehrt.
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Dokumentiert die Überwindung der Identifikation mit dem "groben Körper" (Gross body).
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Thematisiert die Unmöglichkeit für den Geist, nach der "Belichtung" durch das Selbst noch weltliche Bilder aufzunehmen.
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Beschreibt das Ego als "winzigen Punkt aus Dunkelheit", der sich als Welt ausdehnt.
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.
